list.title: AI guidance for your thought diary
list.description: Keeping an automatic thought diary can sometimes be challenging. Our AI recommendation system offers gentle prompts, supports you and guides you around common pitfalls so that working with your thoughts becomes clearer and more comfortable.

list.title: Personalized analysis of your entries
list.description: Share your experiences with our AI, and it will help you look at your situation from a fresh perspective. The system will offer supportive recommendations and highlight cognitive distortions so you can work with them more effectively.

list.title: Personal data security
list.description: You can set a password to enter the app, and your data is additionally encrypted. This provides a high level of protection and ensures that only you have access to your entries.

list.title: AI-powered speech recognition
list.description: We use advanced speech recognition with emotion analysis. The app adds punctuation and structures your text so it looks neat and clear. Get complete entries several times faster than typing by hand.

list.title: Sync across all your devices
list.description: Your entries are securely encrypted and stored on our server. This lets you work with your diary on different devices and have access to your data anytime, anywhere.

list.title: Attach images to your entries
list.description: Add images to your notes to convey emotions and context more precisely. All photos are synced across your devices and, if you choose, can be shared with your psychologist.

list.title: Full access to tests
list.description: Our tests are developed with input from professional psychologists and come with clear explanations. They help you understand yourself better and track changes in your state over time.

list.title: Unlimited access to the knowledge base
list.description: We’ve built a rich knowledge base on psychological well-being and keep expanding it. Read articles without limits and discover new ways to take care of yourself every day.

last.title: You also get access to the following features:
advantages: Automatic data sync with your psychologist
